message:
fix(reservations): extend WAL snapshot freshness to list and unreleased reservation queries

Bug #85 follow-up: The previous commit (c6359252) added BEGIN IMMEDIATE
transactions to get_active_reservations to prevent stale WAL snapshots
from causing phantom reservations.  This extends the same fix to the two
remaining reservation-listing functions that were missed:

- list_file_reservations: when active_only=true, now uses BEGIN
  IMMEDIATE to acquire a fresh WAL snapshot before querying.  All error
  paths properly rollback the transaction before returning.
- list_unreleased_file_reservations: unconditionally uses BEGIN
  IMMEDIATE since it always reads live reservation state.  Same
  rollback-on-error discipline applied.

Bug #86 test correction: The concurrent reservation stress test
previously asserted that BOTH agents could acquire exclusive access to
the same path — which was the bug, not the expected behavior.  The test
now correctly asserts that exactly one agent wins the exclusive
reservation and the other receives a ResourceBusy error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
